fields.title: Migrate beads/ feature
fields.description:
Move beads extension to tau/src/beads/

## Source
- extensions/beads/src/index.ts

## Target  
- extensions/tau/src/beads/index.ts

## Changes
- Export initBeads(pi, state) function
- Use state for any shared config
- Keep tool name 'bd'
- Keep command '/bd'
- Keep message renderer

## DoD
- bd tool works
- /bd command works
- /bd init flow works
- Custom message rendering works
fields.close_reason: Copied beads tool into tau/src/beads (initBeads) and wired into tau entrypoint
